name: HRP Full Universe
description: Hierarchical Risk Parity across all 13 assets: global equities (VUSA, EQQQ, AIGC, IIND, IMEU, IWRD), precious metals (SSLN, SGLN), commodities (COMM, BRNT, CRUD, WCOA), and bonds (VUTY). Ward linkage clustering captures the natural asset-class hierarchy for maximum diversification.
